violations.text: The dishwasher was observed to be in poor repair. Final rinse temperature observed at 107 degrees Fahrenheit. Sanitation logs reviewed, final rinse logs recorded daily. Per PIC, equipment has not been sanitized prior to inspection. Establishment to use dishwasher to WASH only. All equipment and utensils to be sanitized in the 3-bay sink. New Violation. Correct By: 04/01/2026

Chicken and soup were observed not marked with the date of preparation. Ready-to-eat time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods prepared in the establishment and held for more than 24 hours must be marked with the date of preparation. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 02/14/2024

At the time of inspection, 2 Double Door Refrigeration Units located in the kitchen and kitchen storage areas were observed not in use due to being in poor repair. Per the PIC, since previous service, units are to be replaced. Refrigeration units are to be repaired/replaced or removed if not going to be fixed. New Violation. Correct By: 10/02/2023

The Faucet at the 3 bay sink with the connection to the sanitizer mixing valve was observed to be leaking/dripping. The plumbing system is to be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 10/04/2023

At the time of inspection, Hamburgers prepped just prior to lunch service and placed in plastic clamshell containers were observed held at 116 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be maintained at 135 degrees Fahrenheit or above except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Hamburger Clamshell containers were opened to allow for better hot air flow around product within hot holding equipment at the time of inspection. New Violation. Correct By: 09/20/2023

At the time of inspection, 2 Double Door Refrigeration Units located in the kitchen and kitchen storage areas were observed not in use due to being in poor repair. Per the PIC, a work order is in place for the refrigeration units. Refrigeration units are to be repaired/replaced or removed if not going to be fixed. New Violation. Correct By: 10/11/2023

The Faucet at the 3 bay sink with the connection to the sanitizer mixing valve was observed to be leaking/dripping. The plumbing system is to be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 10/04/2023
